Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a payable or receivable entry.

type.description: Whether this is money coming in or going out.

amount.description: The monetary value of the transaction.

dueDate.description: The date when the transaction is due.

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

counterparty.description: The entity involved in the transaction (vendor or client).

category.description: Category for classification (e.g., Inventory, Services, Sales).

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this transaction.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Basic settings for the user's company.

/transactions/{transactionId}.description: Collection of all payables and receivables.
